title: False Salvation
lyricSeed:
You said your love would wash me clean
So I mistook your arms for grace
But the water dried and I'm still me
With the same doubt on my face
I worshipped you like something holy
Now I'm on my knees and lonely
Love ain't the savior I believed
Oh, it left a hollow in its place

chunks.text:
You said your love would wash me clean
